_note: Updated daily at noon by the analytics agent. Plain language — no jargon.

priorities.title: Track whether the AI's room suggestions are actually helpful — accept, tweak, or reject
priorities.note: We can count how many times the AI is asked to generate a room, but we have no way to tell if the result was good. Until we can see whether designers accept, adjust, or throw away those suggestions, we're flying blind on quality.

priorities.title: Measure the one number that matters most: how many finished rooms each user produces per month
priorities.note: There are no external users yet, so this number would be zero. We'll start tracking it properly at the first public release.

priorities.title: Automate the daily dashboard refresh so it runs without anyone pressing a button
priorities.note: The automated system went live today. Every dashboard — including this one — now updates itself each day at noon. No manual work required.

priorities.title: Write clear privacy notices before we start tracking individual user behaviour
priorities.note: We can't track what specific people do until we tell them we're doing it and get their agreement. Legal needs to sign off first. On hold until that conversation happens.

priorities.title: Choose a privacy-respecting analytics service for when the tool goes public
priorities.note: Not needed before launch. We'll revisit this when the first external release is close.
